description_long: This object is a sleek, modern helicopter with a streamlined, dark blue fuselage and metallic accents. The body is smooth and rounded, with two prominent jet-like engines mounted on either side of the main body, just below the wings. The tail section is sharply tapered, ending in a vertical stabilizer with a subtle horizontal fin. The windows are minimal and seamlessly integrated into the body, giving it a futuristic appearance. There are no visible rotor blades or tail rotor, and the landing gear appears to be integrated into the body rather than traditional skids. The overall design suggests a high-speed, possibly concept or luxury helicopter intended for urban environments.
description: A streamlined, dark blue helicopter with metallic accents, jet-like side engines, and a futuristic, window-integrated design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded nose, integrated cockpit window, and symmetrical jet-like engines on each side.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the elongated, smooth fuselage, side engine, and sharply tapered tail with a vertical stabilizer.
description_view_2: Top-down view reveals the full wing span, engine placement, and the absence of visible rotor blades.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the streamlined body, side engine, and tail fin.
attribute_landing_skids: Landing skids are not visible; the helicopter appears to have integrated landing gear.
attribute_cockpit_windows: A single, wide, curved cockpit window is integrated into the nose, darkly tinted and seamlessly framed.
